# Ethan Qiu — Now

> Live "now" page for Ethan Qiu (software engineer, Toronto), regenerated hourly
> by tracking real GitHub + WakaTime activity. Almost nothing is hand-written:
> projects and stack are derived from live data. JSON is the source of truth;
> the markdown and this index are renders.

## Pages

- [Now (markdown)](https://now.ethanqiu.ca/now.md): availability, projects, this week's coding activity, stack
- [Now (JSON)](https://now.ethanqiu.ca/now.json): the full snapshot, structured

## Tools (machine-readable API, regenerated hourly)

- [Tool manifest](https://now.ethanqiu.ca/api): lists every tool, its description, and data URL
- [get_identity](https://now.ethanqiu.ca/api/identity): name, headline, location, links
- [get_availability](https://now.ethanqiu.ca/api/availability): whether Ethan is open to opportunities
- [get_projects](https://now.ethanqiu.ca/api/projects): most recently active GitHub repos with descriptions, languages, stars
- [get_stack](https://now.ethanqiu.ca/api/stack): languages derived from GitHub repos + WakaTime
- [get_activity](https://now.ethanqiu.ca/api/activity): live GitHub + WakaTime activity, last 7 days
- [get_contributions](https://now.ethanqiu.ca/api/contributions): GitHub contribution calendar (daily counts, past year), totals + streaks

## Other resources

- [Portfolio](https://ethanqiu.ca): projects, experience, and contact info
- [Resume (PDF)](https://ethanqiu.ca/resume.pdf): canonical resume
- [GitHub](https://github.com/qiuethan): public code
